name: Performance Indoor Golf
address: 10555 Ocean Hwy Suite D, Pawleys Island, SC 29585
about: Performance Indoor Golf is a premier, members-only indoor golf club located in Pawleys Island, South Carolina. The venue utilizes Trackman technology, providing an accurate and immersive experience with three climate-controlled bays. Members gain access to over 350 world-renowned courses and advanced data analysis for improving their game. The facility is open daily from 5 a.m. to 11 p.m., offering flexible hours for play and practice. Membership includes lessons from PGA Teaching Professionals Stuart Clark, Dave Rosinski, and Ryan Howard, along with multiple televisions for watching live games.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 350 world-class golf courses, including Pebble Beach and St. Andrews
Advanced Trackman technology providing instant swing data and feedback for improvement
Flexible daily hours from 5 a.m. to 11 p.m., allowing for play at any time of day
Lessons from three dedicated PGA Teaching Professionals to refine technique

food_and_drink.notes: Multiple televisions for watching sports; details on food service not specified
No mention of alcohol service on the website

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar technology with ceiling-mounted unit, no floor sensors required

faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental options, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.answers: The venue has multiple televisions showing the latest games, but specific policies on outside food and drinks are not mentioned on the website.

faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, as it depends on the course, number of players, and pace of play.
